sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if level was completed
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
print(f"Reward: {last_action_result.get('reward', None)}")
print(f"Current level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Current step: {current_frame.step}")

# Let me check the current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nCurrent state:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] > 5:
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Node ({node['color']}): rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {node['pixels']}px")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
